CVE-2020-12529.title: Modbus Protocol Lack of Authentication
CVE-2020-12529.description: Modbus TCP protocol inherently lacks authentication, allowing any network client to read/write registers
CVE-2020-12529.workaround: Implement network segmentation and firewall rules
CVE-2020-12529.recommendation: Use Modbus security extensions or implement VPN/firewall protection

CVE-2019-6573.title: Authentication Bypass in Modicon PLCs
CVE-2019-6573.description: Authentication can be bypassed allowing unauthorized firmware download and configuration changes
CVE-2019-6573.recommendation: Update to SV3.20 or later immediately

CVE-2018-7789.title: Modbus Function Code Flooding DoS
CVE-2018-7789.description: Malformed or excessive Modbus function code requests can cause device instability or crash
CVE-2018-7789.workaround: Implement rate limiting at network level
CVE-2018-7789.recommendation: Deploy IDS/IPS with Modbus protocol awareness
